label: Mitsubishi Corporation
description: Japanese integrated trading and investment company; long-running LNG value-chain builder.

label: MC Energy & Power Solution Group
description: Mitsubishi Corporation group overseeing LNG, natural gas, power, trading and energy transition businesses.

label: Diamond Global Energy / Diamond Gas International
description: Singapore-based Mitsubishi subsidiary handling LNG marketing, sales optimization and short-term trading for US/Canada LNG.

label: MC Energies Corporation
description: Mitsubishi's US energy business platform centered on upstream natural gas and energy value chain expansion.

label: LNG Canada Project
description: Canada's first large-scale LNG project in Kitimat, BC; 14 Mtpa production capacity.

label: Diamond LNG Canada Ltd.
description: Mitsubishi subsidiary invested in LNG Canada; procures feed gas and offtakes LNG.

label: Montney Shale Gas Development
description: Upstream shale gas resource base in British Columbia feeding Mitsubishi's Canadian natural gas value chain.

label: Coastal GasLink Pipeline
description: Pipeline route connecting inland gas resources to British Columbia's west-coast LNG export terminal.

label: Cameron LNG
description: US LNG liquefaction project; Mitsubishi holds tolling capacity equivalent to one liquefaction train.

label: Aethon / Haynesville Shale Gas Assets
description: Haynesville shale gas assets in Texas and Louisiana; acquisition agreed by Mitsubishi in 2026.

label: CIMA Energy
description: Houston-based midstream marketing/logistics platform cited by Mitsubishi as part of its North American energy platform.

label: Diamond Generating Corporation
description: Mitsubishi power business in the Americas, including power generation and trading.

label: PETRONAS
description: Malaysia's national oil and gas company; long-term LNG partner of Mitsubishi.

label: PETRONAS LNG Complex Bintulu
description: Large LNG complex in Bintulu, Sarawak; combined 29.3 MTPA capacity across ventures.

label: MLNG Dua
description: Malaysia LNG Dua; Mitsubishi extended 10% equity participation.

label: MLNG Tiga
description: Malaysia LNG Tiga; Mitsubishi reinvested 10% equity participation.

label: Brunei LNG
description: One of the world's longest-operating LNG plants; first shipment to Japan in 1972.

label: Shell
description: Partner in Brunei LNG development after discovering offshore Brunei gas fields.

label: Brunei Government
description: Supported and invested in Brunei LNG establishment.

label: Donggi-Senoro LNG
description: LNG project jointly owned by Mitsubishi, KOGAS, Pertamina and Medco; MC operator/largest stake.

label: Korea Gas Corporation (KOGAS)
description: Korean gas corporation; partner in Donggi-Senoro LNG and key Korean LNG importer.

label: Pertamina
description: Indonesia's state-owned oil and gas company; partner in Donggi-Senoro LNG.

label: Medco Energi
description: Indonesian energy company; partner in Donggi-Senoro LNG.

label: Oman LNG
description: Oman LNG became relevant to Korea as a Hormuz-risk alternative supply-chain partner.

label: Korea Ministry of Trade, Industry and Energy
description: Korean ministry discussing LNG/energy supply-chain cooperation with Oman.

label: Strait of Hormuz
description: Narrow maritime chokepoint between Iran and Oman; major route for oil and LNG.

label: Korean Manufacturing Base
description: Korean manufacturing sectors exposed to LNG, oil, naphtha, helium and ammonia supply shocks.

label: Berkshire Hathaway
description: Warren Buffett-led investment company holding long-term stakes in Japanese trading houses.

label: Five Japanese Trading Houses
description: ITOCHU, Marubeni, Mitsubishi, Mitsui and Sumitomo as Berkshire's Japanese investment basket.

label: AI / Data Center Power Demand
description: Growing electricity demand driver cited in Mitsubishi energy strategy and LNG Canada context.

label: MidOcean Energy
description: Mitsubishi made a 2024.4 strategic investment in MidOcean Energy, adding ~6 indirect LNG projects to its equity portfolio.

label: KOREA LNG
description: Vehicle through which KOGAS holds a 5.0% equity stake in Oman LNG.

label: Sulawesi LNG Development
description: 75/25 Mitsubishi–KOGAS holding vehicle underlying the Donggi-Senoro LNG project.
